faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: Find answers to the most commonly asked questions

items.question: How are your products made?
items.answer: All our products are made in France in our workshop, using rigorously selected natural ingredients. Every batch is tested to ensure optimal quality.

items.question: What are the delivery times?
items.answer: Orders are shipped within 24 to 48 business hours. Standard delivery then takes 2 to 4 business days in mainland France.

items.question: Can I return a product?
items.answer: Yes, you have 14 days after receipt to return an unopened product. Contact our customer service to initiate the return.

items.question: Are your products organic?
items.answer: Most of our ingredients come from certified organic farming. Each product page specifies the applicable certifications.

items.question: How do I place an order?
items.answer: Simply add the desired products to your cart, then follow the secure payment steps. You will receive a confirmation email.

items.question: Do dietary supplements replace medical treatment?
items.answer: No. Our dietary supplements are not medicines and do not replace medical treatment. Always consult a healthcare professional.

footer.description: Natural remedies from ancestral wisdom, made in France with quality ingredients.

disclaimer.full: The information provided on this website does not constitute medical advice. Dietary supplements do not replace a varied and balanced diet or a healthy lifestyle. Do not exceed the recommended dose. Keep out of reach of children. Consult a healthcare professional before use if you are pregnant, breastfeeding or undergoing medical treatment.
disclaimer.short: Dietary supplement. Does not replace a varied and balanced diet. Do not exceed the recommended dose.
disclaimer.minimal: This website offers dietary supplements, not medicines.
